summary: EcoRent UK testing completed with backend APIs functioning perfectly (100% pass rate) but frontend authentication issues preventing full feature testing. All new account management, notification, and chat management endpoints working correctly.

authentication_bugs.issue: Form submission stays on registration page instead of redirecting to dashboard
authentication_bugs.symptoms: User registration appears to fail or not process correctly

authentication_bugs.issue: JSON parsing error during authentication flow
authentication_bugs.error_message: Failed to execute 'json' on 'Response': body stream already read
authentication_bugs.impact: Prevents testing of all authenticated features

untested_features.feature: Account Management Buttons (Change Password, 2FA, Delete Account)
untested_features.reason: Cannot authenticate to access settings page
Cannot authenticate to access chat page

passed_tests: Landing page shows 'Get Started' instead of 'Start Free Trial'
Navigation menu structure and links working
All page sections accessible (Features, How It Works, Regulations, Contact)
Registration page accessible with proper form elements
Login page accessible with Google OAuth option
Dashboard stats endpoint includes compliance data (compliant_properties, non_compliant_properties, compliance_percentage)
HEM Calculator working with proper ROI calculations
AI Chat with Claude categorization working
User authentication and session management working (backend)
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (22/22 tests), Frontend: 60% (6/10 core features - auth blocking others)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix frontend authentication flow issues: 1) Registration form not redirecting to dashboard after successful submission, 2) JSON parsing error in authentication flow preventing login. Backend APIs are fully functional - issue is in frontend form handling and response processing.
